steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage describes Naff doing two things: conducting more than 450 interviews and collecting photographs/artifacts. These are distinct activities that both contributed to her historical work.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”In addition,” works because it marks Naff's photography collection as a second work activity after her interviews.

The other three fail: “In other words,” restates the interview activity; “On the contrary,” invents a contradiction; and “Today,” shifts time without connecting the activities.

That matches Choice C — In addition,.
